prompt: Round 5 live-state sweep. Use dirty-files.txt and fabric-doctor.txt as local evidence. Aggressively dedupe against ISS-20260609-001..059.

dimensions.description: Scan current uncommitted modified product files for introduced contract or snapshot inconsistencies.
Turn fabric doctor live warnings into issue candidates only when they represent deterministic code/config inconsistency not already registered.
Compare installed .claude/.codex hooks/skills/managed blocks against templates and tests for drift.
Store scope, summary, alias-link, maturity parsing, events/metrics health tail issues beyond registry.
Validate generated discovery artifacts, issues.jsonl schema/source/ID ordering/history consistency after multiple rounds.
